hierarchyManagerPage.name: Name
hierarchyManagerPage.searchInfo: Click the search button to start a new search by name. Search is case sensitive. First matching result will be auto-scrolled to center-most position, edges of the graph allowing.
hierarchyManagerPage.setAsPrimaryHierarchyTooltip: This action will set the hierarchy as primary. Once set, it cannot be changed back to a non-primary hierarchy. All hierarchy data used in applications is pulled from the primary hierarchy.
hierarchyManagerPage.title: Create New Hierarchy

search.label: Search
search.info: Click the search button to start a new search by name. Search is case sensitive. First matching result will be auto-scrolled to center-most position, edges of the graph allowing.
search.noValue: Please enter a search value to begin searching.

add-child.addOUInformation: This action will create a child node of the Organization Unit (OU) type. After OU is created, you will be able to add members.
add-child.addTeamInformation: This action will create a child node of the Team type by selecting one of the existing Teams. After Team node is created, you will be able to view Team information and membership.
add-child.name: Name

members.noMembersAdded: No members have been added yet
members.SUToAddMembers: Navigate to the Scheduling Unit via Admin to add members.
members.teamToAddMembers: Navigate to the Team via Admin to add members.
members.onceMembersAdded: Once members are added they will show up here
members.noResultsFound: All available members have been selected
members.allUsersSelectedAlreadyAdded: All users selected currently exist in OU
members.userAlreadyMemberOf: User is already a member of

delete.ouDeleteMsg: You are about to delete this OU from the hierarchy. With this action the network beneath this OU including all child nodes (if any) will be deleted.
delete.suDeleteMsg: You are about to delete this SU from the hierarchy. With this action the network beneath this SU including all child nodes (if any) will be deleted.
delete.teamDeleteMsg: You are about to remove this team from the hierarchy.

generalErrorMessages.SUAlreadyAdded: This SU is already added under
generalErrorMessages.TeamAlreadyAdded: This team is already added under

hierarchyToasts.cannotPerformAction: This action cannot be performed at this time
hierarchyToasts.teamIsAlreadyChildOfParent: The team you want to add is already a child node

dragAndDrop.OUChildOfSU: This action cannot be performed as Organization Unit cannot be child of Scheduling Unit
dragAndDrop.OUChildOfTeam: This action cannot be performed as Organization Unit cannot be child of Team
dragAndDrop.SUChildOfTeam: This action cannot be performed as Scheduling Unit cannot be child node of Team
dragAndDrop.TeamChildOfTeam: This action cannot be performed as Team cannot be child node of Team
dragAndDrop.ExceedsLimit: This action cannot be performed since it goes beyond allowable hierarchy depth of 12 levels
dragAndDrop.AlreadyConnected: This action cannot be performed since the nodes are already connected

permissionErrors.addChild: You do not have permissions to add children
permissionErrors.editNode: You do not have permissions to edit a node
permissionErrors.deleteNode: You do not have permissions to delete a node
permissionErrors.dragAndDrop: You do not have permissions to modify the hierarchy structure
permissionErrors.userPermission: You do not have permissions to view users of an OU

primaryHierarchyModal.title: Set as a Primary Hierarchy
primaryHierarchyModal.message:
This action will set {{hierarchyName}} as the Primary Hierarchy of your organization.


This action is permanent and can't be undone.
Are you sure you want to continue?
